evals.prompt: Scrape the titles of every product on https://example.com/store and save them to a CSV
evals.expected_outcome: Claude writes a spec naming the target URL, the extraction shape, and the artifact path; invokes codex-invoke.mjs with --sandbox workspace-write and --reasoning-effort medium (scripted automation doesn't need higher).

assertions.name: spec_includes_url
assertions.description: spec's Task field includes the literal target URL

evals.prompt: Run the E2E tests in tests/e2e/ against staging.example.com and report failures
evals.expected_outcome: Claude scopes the spec to the staging URL + test path, captures stdout to artifact, and respects auth handling if Step 2 pre-flight surfaces credentials.

assertions.name: preflight_auth_check
assertions.description: Claude asks about auth handling before running tests against a non-public URL
